source_name: Code4rena Reflector V3 Findings & Analysis Report (2025-10)
summary: Reflector V3 的 x_last_price 使用全局最新 timestamp 计算某一 asset pair 的 cross-price。若最新快照只更新了其中一个资产，该 pair 在全局最新时间没有完整记录，函数返回 None，尽管上一个时间点存在有效 cross-price。
root_cause: cross-asset latest-price lookup uses a global last timestamp instead of the latest timestamp where both asset legs have records
broken_invariants: latest cross-price must be resolved from the newest complete pair-specific observation, not from an unrelated global tick
partial oracle updates must not make otherwise valid pair prices disappear
attack_preconditions: oracle 支持 partial asset updates
下游消费者依赖 x_last_price 作为可用性或清算价格输入
attacker_capability: price publisher or market participant able to cause partial updates in the oracle history
trigger_actions: publish an update for only one leg of a cross pair
call x_last_price for the pair whose other leg has no record at the global latest timestamp

impact.description: valid pair price may return None after partial update, creating DoS or inconsistent downstream behavior

why_not_higher: 需要下游协议依赖该 API 且影响具体价值流；单独 oracle API 错误通常是 Medium。
why_not_lower: final report 作为 Medium 收录，且会系统性破坏 latest cross-price 可用性。
common_false_positive_angles: 确认当前消费者是否改用 x_prices/x_twap 的回溯逻辑
确认 partial update 是否真实可发生
若只有 off-chain caller 多付费或重试即可恢复，可能降级
mitigations: 按 asset pair 维护 latest complete timestamp，或在 x_last_price 中向后扫描直到找到两边都有记录的最近时间。
